notes:
Ask Voxhelm to check, look up, or find anything online and it now answers straight from a live web search - no browser windows opening by themselves.
Questions about the latest anything - models, prices, releases, news - are pulled fresh from the web instead of Voxhelm's older built-in knowledge.
'Open the browser' now opens YOUR Chrome, signed in as you. Asking for a site opens it in your default browser. The separate automation window only appears when you ask Voxhelm to actually do something on a page, and it starts itself when needed.
Fixed: if a page or YouTube got stuck, every browser command after it would hang too. A stuck connection now recovers on its own, and Voxhelm tells you honestly when something didn't go through.
